subject: G550
body:
Jeffrey

Pete informs the new spoilers board install going well, should be return to service late wed evening, or Noon Thursday at the latest., they are painting the white underside this evening, Blue upper surface tomorrow and clear coat Wed morn.

President Trump arrives Friday at 4:30pm ish.

Should Dave and Darren move the G550 to Boca Thursday?

Thx
Larry

Sent from my iPhone
